strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with diverse tech stacks (D, TypeScript, Node.js, etc.)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective (open-source Geo-Data platform) and startup roles
concerns: No explicit AI/ML-focused product or platform experience in resume
Lacks advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields
Limited mention of cloud technologies (AWS CDK used, but no deeper cloud strategy experience)
response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth and entrepreneurial experience, but lacks direct AI/ML product development or advanced AI research credentials. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not sufficient for a Director-level AI Strategy role. The resume highlights software craftsmanship and breadth over deep AI specialization.
